query:
-- Assign default plan to existing users without a plan
UPDATE users u
JOIN permission_plans p ON p.role = u.role AND p.isDefault = 1
SET u.permissionPlanId = p.id
WHERE u.permissionPlanId IS NULL AND u.role IN ('client', 'reseller');
